createTable.remarks: Table that acts as a generic worker queue.

column.name: queue_name
column.remarks: The name of the queue, defines the the type of the work being executed.

column.name: entity_id
column.remarks: The identifier of an entity that is a subject for the worker defined by the queue name.

column.name: status
column.remarks: Stores the state of the worker in the queue.

column.name: retry_count
column.remarks: How many times was this job retried.

column.name: needs_reschedule
column.remarks: Flag when set to `true` should reschedule the job for execution when completed.

column.name: scheduled_at
column.remarks: Timestamp that is used by the scheduler to queue the job.

column.name: started_at
column.remarks: Timestamp that tells the time when this job was started and locked.

column.name: created_at
column.remarks: Timestamp when this job was added to the worker queue.
